form1: Form 1: This form is regarding physical condition of Stormwater Drain (SWD) and adjoining utilities.
safety: 1.1 Your safety is our priority.
rhs_lhs: 1.3 Enter Right hand side and Left hand side (as per the My Maps)
location: 1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise
lat: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_latitude
long: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_longitude
alt: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_altitude
precision: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_precision
section2: Section 2. The next set of questions will be about Retaining wall.
wall_condition: 2.1 What is the condition of the retaining wall?
wall_height: 2.2 Height of retaining wall from the road level (approx.) in feet? Ask a person to stand near the wall. If you know their height you can use it to write the approximate height  of the retaining wall.
fence: 2.3 Observe if there is a fence on top of the retaining wall.
wall_pic: 2.5 Please take a picture of the retaining wall.
outdated: 2.5 Please take a picture of the retaining wall. _URL
street_pic: 2.6 Take a photo of the street such that the buildings are visible. Take photo in the direction of your movement.
field_23: 2.6 Take a photo of the street such that the buildings are visible. Take photo in the direction of your movement. _URL
section3: Section 3. The next set of questions will be about the condition of bridges on SWD
bridge_pic: 3.4 Take a picture of the bridge. A good image will ideally include the top of the bridge, showcasing entry/exit.
outdated_1: 3.4 Take a picture of the bridge. A good image will ideally include the top of the bridge, showcasing entry/exit. _URL
piers_num: 3.6 Number of Piers? Please specify. If there are no piers, write 0
piers_pic: 3.7 Take a picture of the bridge. A good image will ideally show underside of the bridge with piers.
section4: Section 4. The next set of questions will be about Utility lines and Manholes
elec_condition: 4.1 Are there any electricity lines, transformers outside the SWD?
elec_pic: 4.2 Please take a picture of electricity lines, transformers outside the SWD.
cables_condition: 4.3 Are there cables or lines crossing  the SWD?
cables_pic: 4.4 Please take a picture of utility lines inside the SWD.
outdated_2: 4.4 Please take a picture of utility lines inside the SWD._URL
manholes_condition: 4.5 Are there manholes in the SWD?
manholes_pic: 4.6 Please take a picture of manhole in the SWD
outdated_3: 4.6 Please take a picture of manhole in the SWD _URL
